工.origin: 像一把工人用的工具，表示做工、工作。

sentence.en: The workers are building a house.

巩.origin: “工”加“凡”，有牢牢固定、加强的意思。

sentence.en: Reviewing helps strengthen what you learn.

巫.origin: 像一根十字形的法器，指会作法的人。

sentence.en: There is an old wizard in the story.

差.origin: 有不一样、不够好的意思。

sentence.en: There is little difference between the two apples.

己.origin: 弯弯的形状，常用来指自己。

sentence.en: I will do this myself.

已.origin: 和“己”很像，表示事情已经做完了。

sentence.en: The sun has already come out.

巳.origin: 十二地支之一，指上午九点到十一点。

sentence.en: Ancient people used 'sì' to mark the time.

巴.origin: 有盼望、紧贴的意思，也用在词的末尾。

sentence.en: The puppy is wagging its tail.
His home is in a small alley.

币.origin: 下面是“巾”，指用来买东西的钱。

sentence.en: I have collected many coins.

帅.origin: 指军队的统领，也形容样子好看、潇洒。

sentence.en: My older brother looks handsome today.
There is a sailboat on the sea.
I hope tomorrow is sunny.
We pitched a tent on the grass.

帕.origin: “巾”表示布，指擦手擦脸的小布。

sentence.en: She wiped her sweat with a handkerchief.

帖.origin: “巾”加“占”，指写着字的卡片或通知。

sentence.en: He received an invitation card.

帧.origin: “巾”表示意思，“贞”提示读音，用来数图画。

sentence.en: This is one frame of the animation.

席.origin: 屋子“广”里铺着草或布的垫子，指座位。

sentence.en: Please everyone take your seats.
I often go to the library.

幂.origin: 上面是盖子“冖”，下面是“巾”，指盖东西的布。

sentence.en: This character is read mì.

幕.origin: “巾”表示布，指挂起来的大布帘。

sentence.en: The curtain opened before the show.

幡.origin: “巾”表示布，指挂起来的长条旗子。

sentence.en: Banners hang in front of the temple.

幢.origin: “巾”表示布，指车上挂的帘子，也用来数楼房。

sentence.en: That is a tall building.

平.origin: 像一把水平的尺子，表示又平又稳。

sentence.en: Wishing you a safe trip.

并.origin: 像两个人并排站着，有合在一起的意思。

sentence.en: He is smart and hardworking.
Our family is very happy.

幺.origin: 细小的样子，在口语里也表示数字一。

sentence.en: He is the youngest in the family.

幼.origin: “幺”表示小，“力”表示力气，指年纪小的孩子。

sentence.en: My little sister started kindergarten.

庆.origin: 屋子“广”里有大“大”事，表示庆祝。

sentence.en: We celebrate the birthday together.
Please line up in order.

库.origin: 屋子“广”里停着“车”，指放东西的仓库。

sentence.en: The goods are kept in the warehouse.
We should go to bed early.

庙.origin: 屋子“广”里有“由”，指供奉神佛或祖先的地方。

sentence.en: We go to the temple fair during the New Year.

庚.origin: 天干之一，也用来指年龄。

sentence.en: This character is read gēng.

府.origin: “广”表示房子，指办公或大户人家的地方。

sentence.en: The government built a new school.

庞.origin: 屋子“广”里有“龙”，形容又大又杂。

sentence.en: An elephant's body is huge.

废.origin: 有不要了、停止用的意思。

sentence.en: Please throw the trash into the bin.

度.origin: 有程度、温度的意思，也指过日子。

sentence.en: The temperature is high today.
I have a happy family.

庵.origin: “广”表示房子，指尼姑或和尚住的小庙。

sentence.en: There is a small nunnery on the mountain.

廉.origin: 有清白、不贪，也有便宜的意思。

sentence.en: This piece of clothing is very cheap.
The holiday was extended by three days.

廿.origin: 像两个“十”并在一起，表示二十。

sentence.en: This character means twenty and is read niàn.
No matter how hard, don't give up.
Doing this has many drawbacks.
He went hunting with a bow and arrow.

引.origin: “弓”加上一竖，像拉开弓弦，指拉、带领。

sentence.en: The teacher guides us to think.

张.origin: “弓”表示意思，指拉开、展开，也用来数纸，还作姓。

sentence.en: Give me a sheet of paper.

弦.origin: “弓”加“玄”，指弓上拉的线，也指琴弦。

sentence.en: She gently plucks the strings.

弧.origin: “弓”加“瓜”，指像弓一样弯弯的线。

sentence.en: A rainbow is arc-shaped.
